chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D — 922 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 24.08.2023. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. Mr. Mashoque Ali Mahar Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. along with Syed Imran Hyder Shah Chief Officer District Council Mirpurkhas and Tahir Ali Account Officer District Council Mirpurkhas. ----- This petition challenges the promotion of some of the colleagues of the petitioner and he himself prayed for his promotion during pendency he claimed to have been promoted but the arrears have not been paid though he has been paid current salary in terms of his promotion. This controversy was never a part of this petition as far as the issue of promotion is concerned that at best rests when he was promoted and virtually the relief claimed in this petition has become infructuous. Insofar as the claim of arrears is concerned, he may exhaust remedy for its recovery as required under the law. The petition since has served its purpose is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE A.
